turns.speaker: user
turns.text: When did you last see the document?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Was it before or after the meeting?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: So it was before the meeting. What time specifically?

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: I really don't remember the exact time.

assertions.note: no hostility — just persistent questioning. KNOWN GAP: gentle narrowing not yet detected by rules.
